step_rationale: COL4A2 is a CHD risk variant affecting basement-membrane integrity and plaque stability.
mechanism: COL4A2 variants confer coronary artery disease susceptibility via effects on collagen IV-mediated plaque stabilization and fibrous-cap integrity.

references.title: Novel risk genes identified in a genome-wide association study for coronary artery disease in patients with type 1 diabetes.

Coronary-Heart-Disease-Associated Genetic Variant at the COL4A1/COL4A2 Locus Affects COL4A1/COL4A2 Expression, Vascular Cell Survival, Atherosclerotic Plaque Stability and Risk of Myocardial Infarction.
